revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Selected article]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2568 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported: importing misc last stuff
